tickets.subject: Unable to login to account
tickets.description: I am unable to login to my account. It shows 'Invalid credentials' even though I am using the correct password.

messages.name: Rahul Sharma
messages.text: I am unable to login to my account. It shows 'Invalid credentials' even though I am using the correct password.

messages.name: Priya Mehta
messages.text: Hi Rahul, sorry for the inconvenience. Let me check this for you. Could you try resetting your password?

messages.name: Rahul Sharma
messages.text: I tried resetting, but didn't receive the password reset link email.

messages.name: Priya Mehta
messages.text: I have resent the password reset link. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

tickets.subject: Payment not reflecting
tickets.description: I made a payment of ₹15,000 for the Premium plan upgrade. The amount was debited, but my dashboard still shows the Standard plan.

messages.name: Amit Verma
messages.text: I made a payment of ₹15,000 for the Premium plan upgrade. The amount was debited, but my dashboard still shows standard.

tickets.subject: Feature request: Dark mode
tickets.description: Our team works late at night and a dark mode interface would greatly reduce eye strain. Are there plans to implement this soon?

messages.name: Sneha Iyer
messages.text: Our team works late at night and a dark mode interface would help. Are there plans for this?

tickets.subject: App crash on startup
tickets.description: The Android application crashes immediately on the loading splash screen. I tried reinstalling, but the issue persists.

messages.name: Dinesh Kumar
messages.text: The Android application crashes immediately on startup. I tried reinstalling.
